title: Senior Teacher - Toppr Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Toppr Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Toppr Capital India in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Toppr Capital India:
Toppr Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr Capital India!
